final:
module sr_flip_flop (
    input wire S,
    input wire R,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (S && R) begin
        Q <= 0;  // Undefined state resolved to 0
    end else if (S) begin
        Q <= 1;  // Set state
    end else if (R) begin
        Q <= 0;  // Reset state
    end
    // If both are low, Q retains its previous value
end

endmodule
